headline: Insufficient verifiable on-chain data to assess control structure

rationale.verdict: Unable to determine control properties because no verifiable deployed contracts, admin addresses, or governance mechanisms could be confirmed from the allowed sources; all checklist items remain unresolved.

evidence.shows: Audit document referenced by protocol, but not clearly tied to deployed Yield Basis contracts or current governance/control setup

unknowns: C1: Could not identify any deployed Ethereum contract addresses for Yield Basis to read owner/admin roles on a block explorer
C2: Upgradeability pattern (proxy type or immutability) could not be determined due to missing deployed contract references
C3: Execution path from governance proposal to implementation cannot be reconstructed without known governance or timelock contracts
C4: No multisig addresses (admin, emergency, or operational) could be identified from available sources
C5: No on-chain governance contracts or parameters (voting delay, period, quorum) could be found or verified
C6: No evidence of emergency pause/guardian roles or separate emergency control paths
C7: Cannot classify power tier because no privileged functions or control paths are observable on-chain
